result.markdown:
---
title: "Differential abundance analysis"
author: ""
---

::: {.cell}

:::



Analysis information:

-   Method: maaslin3
-   Taxonomic level: species, genus
-   Group variable: Diet
-   Formula used: **~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)**
-   Correction: **Benjamini-Hochberg FDR adjustment**
-   Detection threshold: 0.1%
-   Prevalence threshold: 10%

In the report, a suffix of 1~ timepoint 1 and 2~ timepoint 2



::: {.cell}
